app.syncTelegramHint: Opens Telegram to link your account (placeholder flow).

workspaceNotFound.title: Workspace not found
workspaceNotFound.description: This URL does not match an active workspace. Check the subdomain or ask your admin for the correct link.
workspaceNotFound.apexDescription: Sign-in is only available on a workspace subdomain, not bare localhost.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in with your phone number and one-time password.
login.unifiedFlowHint: Enter your phone number. If you already have an account you will sign in after the code; otherwise you will complete a short registration.
login.toastInvalidPhoneOrOtp: Invalid phone number or OTP code.
login.toastNoMembership: No active workspace membership for this account.
login.toastSessionNotEstablished: Session was not established. Please try again.
login.toastGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Complete your profile to finish onboarding for this workspace.
register.footerBackToLogin: Back to sign in with phone
register.toastMissingSession: Registration session is missing. Start from login again.
register.toastInviteFailed: Registration completed, but invite acceptance failed.

catalogErrors.invalidEquipmentIdsTenant: Some selected equipment is no longer in this workspace. Please review and update the tour’s gear lists.
catalogErrors.invalidTourThemeIdsTenant: Some selected tour themes are no longer in this workspace. Please review and update tour themes.
catalogErrors.invalidGuideLanguageIdsTenant: Some selected guide languages are no longer in this workspace. Please review and update guide languages.
catalogErrors.genericInvalidCatalogTenant: Some of this tour’s settings are no longer valid. Please review the selected catalog values.

form.validationSummaryIntro: Save is blocked until these issues are resolved:
form.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

photos.title: Upload Photos
photos.hint: You can upload up to 10 common image files.

basic.title: Tour title
basic.peakHeightDescription: Summit or destination height above sea level (e.g. 3900 m). Prefilled from the destination catalog when available.
basic.localGuideNamePlaceholder: e.g. village guide contact or name
basic.requiresManualAdminApproval: Requires admin approval to finalize booking
basic.capacityMaxDerivedFromTransport: This value is calculated on the logistics step.

locationZones.searchPlaceholder: Type a place name, city, or address…
locationZones.searchHint: Suggestions appear after you pause typing.
locationZones.mapHint: Click the map or drag the marker to set coordinates.
locationZones.mapPickerHint: Use the map button to set precise coordinates.

basic.multiDayHint: Multi-day tour — enter an end date/time.

program.themesHint: Marketing tags only — tour kind and rules are set by category above.
program.themesEmpty: No active themes in workspace settings.
program.elevationGainDescription: Total vertical gain over the route (e.g. 1100 m).
program.dailyLocationPlaceholder: Stop or area for this day (optional)
program.dailyLocationGeolocationHint: Search or open the map to set an optional pin for this day.

gear.title: Equipment & gear
gear.hint: Pick items from workspace settings; mark each as required or optional.
gear.catalogEmptyWithStaleHint: The active equipment catalog is empty. The items below are left over from a previous tour — click to remove them.

transport.dongAmount: Dong — personal car fuel share (Toman per person)
transport.adminCapacityApproval: Calculate capacity from vehicles and seats

pricing.offlineOnlyHint: Payment is offline bank receipt only — no online gateway in this pilot.
pricing.basePricePerPersonHint: Base per-person price when the tour is paid.
pricing.includesTourInsurance: This tour includes group liability insurance
pricing.nonAttendanceDetailsPlaceholder: Notes for participants who did not attend…

participants.fitnessPrerequisitePlaceholder: e.g. prior mountain experience, no serious health issues…
participants.mountainHint: Mountain tours require minimum age, fitness, and sports insurance in validation.

review.publishDraftOnlyWarning: This tour is saved as a Draft because it lacks required fields for publication.
review.publishSubmitBlocked: You cannot submit as Published until publication requirements are met. Switch to Draft or fix the items listed above.
review.submitPhase5Hint: Final submit activates after the Phase 5 API mapper.
review.validationSummaryTitle: {count, plural, one {There is 1 error in the form} other {There are # errors in the form}} — please fix the items below:

edit.pageDescription: Edit tour fields aligned with the Denali wizard; changes are saved via PATCH.

new.metadataDescription: Add a new tour via the workspace API when configured.
new.pageDescription: Creates a tour via POST /api/v2/tours when the API URL is configured.
new.cardDescription: Required fields match the workspace create-tour API (MVP).
new.wizardPresetBannerAria: Tour creation preset from workspace settings
new.wizardPresetIntroHint: Pick a workspace template first (optional), then fill in the rest.
new.wizardPresetSuggestedHint: After choosing, click Apply preset to merge defaults onto the form.
new.wizardPresetInactiveApplyBlocked: This template is inactive in settings — enable it there or pick another template to apply.
new.emptySignInDescription: Your session is missing or expired. Sign in to create tours.
new.emptyLeaderDescription: Only tour leaders can create tours in this workspace.
new.emptyApiDescription: Open the app on your workspace host (e.g. ws1-rbac.localhost) to create tours.
new.mutationForbidden: You don't have permission to create tours in this workspace. If you think this is a mistake, sign in with an owner or admin account, or ask your workspace owner to update your role.
new.mutationGenericFailed: Failed to create tour. Please try again.
new.draftSaveFailed: Could not save your draft. Your edits are kept locally until you retry.
new.wizardTemplateLoadFailedDescription: This workspace has no wizard template (e.g. after a Denali reset). From apps/api run: ALLOW_DENALI_RESET=1 pnpm run reset:denali:provision
new.wizardClassicShellUnavailableDescription: This workspace profile uses the classic tour form rail, which is not mounted on this page yet. Switch the workspace template to a Denali-capable profile or contact support.
new.fieldTitleDescription: Make it descriptive: include destination and tour type (10–120 characters).
new.placeholderTitle: e.g. Damavand summit, 2-day tour from south face
new.fieldDescriptionFullPage: Shown on the full tour page. Aim for about 200–800 words of useful detail.
new.fieldTourTypeDescription: Top-level category of the tour (mountain, city, desert, …). Use Trip style below for the execution sub-genre (adventure, luxury, …).
new.fieldTransportDescription: Tick every organized transport option used on this tour. There is no "mixed" option—select multiple modes instead. Leave all unchecked if none apply.
new.trip_durationDaysComputedDescription: Auto-calculated from the departure and return dates (inclusive). Allowed range: 1–60.
new.checkboxAutoAccept: Automatically accept registrations until capacity is full
new.fieldSocialLinksDescription: The first link is treated as the primary communication link for current API compatibility.
new.validationTitleTooShort: Title must be at least 10 characters and clearly state the destination/type.
new.validationTitleTooLong: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
new.validationCapacityWholeNumber: Capacity must be a whole number.
new.validationDifficultyRequiredMountain: Difficulty level is required for this event kind.
new.validationDifficultyRatingHalfStep: Difficulty must be a half-step value (e.g. 1, 1.5, 2 … 10).
new.validationMinimumAgeRequiredMountain: Minimum age is required for this event kind.
new.validationGearRequiredMountain: At least one required equipment item is needed for this event kind.
new.validationGearIdEachInvalid: Each selection must be a valid equipment id (UUID).
new.validationTourThemeIdEachInvalid: Each selected theme must be a valid id (UUID).
new.validationMeetingPointRequiredMountain: Meeting point is required for this event kind.
new.validationDepartureDateRequiredMountain: Departure date is required for this event kind.
new.validationDepartureDateNotPast: Departure date cannot be in the past.
new.validationReturnDateNotPast: Return date cannot be in the past.
new.validationReturnDateBeforeDeparture: Return date must be on or after the departure date.
new.validationTimeFormatInvalid: Time must be in HH:MM (24h) format.
new.validationAudienceOverlap: The same audience group cannot be both suitable and not suitable.
new.trip_introHelp: Optional structured details are saved separately from the marketing description above and appear in API {code}.
new.trip_fieldRequiredHint: This field is required for this event type.
new.trip_fieldRecommendedHint: Completing this field is recommended for clearer communication.
new.trip_mountainRequiredNote: For mountain tours, minimum age and at least one required equipment item are mandatory.
new.trip_tripStyleDescription: Execution sub-genre — pick every style that fits this tour (e.g. adventure + photography, or luxury + relaxed). Independent from Tour type above (mountain, city, …). Leave all unchecked if unspecified.
new.trip_difficultyMountainDescription: For mountain tours this is required and should reflect both physical load and technical challenge.
new.trip_maxAltitudeMetersDescription: Mountain tours only. Highest point reached on the route, in meters above sea level.
new.trip_tourThemesDescription: Choose one or more themes from your workspace catalog (Settings → Tour themes). Multiple selections allowed.
new.trip_tourThemesPlaceholder: Add a theme and press Enter or Add
new.trip_tourThemesLoadError: Could not load themes. Check your connection and try again.
new.trip_tourThemesEmptyHint: No tour themes yet. Add themes under Settings → Tour themes.
new.trip_audienceMatrixDescription: For each group, choose Suitable or Not suitable, or leave both unchecked. A group cannot be both at once.
new.trip_shortIntroDescription: 2–3 short sentences for tour cards, lists, and meta description (max 250 characters). Shown on cards and previews; if empty, the full description above is used on cards instead.
new.trip_dayByDayHelp: Optional structured days (day number required per row).
new.trip_fitnessDescription: Describe overall intensity (physical + technical), e.g. light hiking, heavy trekking, or technical climbing.
new.trip_experienceLevelDescription: Prior participant experience, e.g. first tour, day-hike background, or comfortable above 3000 m.
new.trip_technicalSkillDescription: Specific technical skills needed, e.g. crampons, rope work, rock contact, or technical route passages.
new.trip_minimumAgeDescription: Enforced as an admission rule; younger participants cannot be approved.
new.trip_medicalRestrictionsDescription: Conditions that could make the program unsafe, e.g. heart disease, uncontrolled asthma, or severe altitude illness history.
new.trip_gearRequiredDescription: Choose items from your workspace equipment library (Settings → Equipment).
new.trip_gearOptionalDescription: Recommended extras from your workspace equipment library.
new.trip_gearEquipmentEmptyHint: No equipment items yet. Add some under Settings → Equipment.
new.trip_gearEquipmentLoadError: Could not load equipment. Check your connection and try again.
new.trip_guideLanguagesDescription: Pick from languages configured for this workspace.
new.trip_guideLanguagesEmptyHint: No guide languages yet. A workspace owner or admin can add them for the team.
new.trip_difficultyLevelDescription: Numeric scale from 1 (very easy) to 10 (extreme), in 0.5 steps. Choose the value that best reflects the overall difficulty.

tours.detail_locked_body_guest: This information becomes available after you register and your booking is confirmed. Exact meeting coordinates unlock 48 hours before the trip for confirmed participants.
tours.detail_locked_body_gps: Exact meeting points and GPS coordinates unlock 48 hours before departure for confirmed participants.
tours.detail_locked_itinerary: The detailed day-by-day route is available after your registration is accepted.
tours.detail_locked_gps: Exact meeting coordinates unlock before departure for confirmed participants.
tours.detail_locked_logistics: Detailed meeting points and transport notes are available after booking.
tours.detail_locked_participation: Participant requirements are shown after your registration is accepted.
tours.detail_locked_policies: Full cancellation and safety policies are available after booking.

settings.hubWorkspaceDescription: Shared lists used when creating tours (locations, equipment, themes, and guide languages).
settings.hubLocationsBlurb: Regions and destinations staff pick when creating a tour—shown on the tour page.
settings.hubEquipmentBlurb: Checklist items for required/optional gear in the tour form—travelers see what to bring.
settings.hubTourThemesBlurb: Theme tags for the tour form—customers see them on tour details and in filters.
settings.hubGuideLanguagesBlurb: Languages the guide speaks—picked in the tour form and shown on the tour page.
settings.equipmentReadOnlyHint: No items yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to add equipment here.
settings.equipmentReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.emailCardSubtitle: Used for sign-in and workspace notifications.
settings.fieldNationalIdDescription: 10 digits; Persian or Latin numerals. Leave empty if you prefer not to store it.
settings.fieldBirthDateDescription: Jalali picker; stored as Gregorian YYYY-MM-DD.
settings.validationNationalIdLength: National ID must be exactly 10 digits.
settings.validationNationalIdInvalid: This national ID is not valid.
settings.validationBirthDateInvalid: Birth date is not valid (allowed range roughly 1900 through today).
settings.loadFailedDescription: Profile could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
settings.saveFailedToast: Could not save settings. Please try again.
settings.validationFullNameMax: Full name must not exceed 255 characters.

meErrors.AUTH_UNAUTHENTICATED: You must sign in to continue.
meErrors.BACKEND_UNREACHABLE: Service is unavailable. Please try again later.
meErrors.TENANT_SCOPE_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to do this in this workspace.
meErrors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Some fields are invalid. Please check your input.
meErrors.USER_EMAIL_CONFLICT: This email is already in use.
meErrors.USER_PHONE_CONFLICT: This phone number is already registered.
meErrors.USER_PHONE_UNCHANGED: This is already your current number.
meErrors.EMAIL_VERIFICATION_INVALID: The verification link or code is invalid or has expired.
meErrors.MOBILE_OTP_INVALID_PURPOSE: The verification code cannot be used for this step.
meErrors.USER_NATIONAL_ID_INVALID: The national ID is not valid.
meErrors.USER_NATIONAL_ID_CONFLICT: This national ID is already linked to another account.
meErrors.USER_BIRTH_DATE_INVALID: The birth date is outside the allowed range.
meErrors.PROFILE_ROW_VERSION_CONFLICT: Your profile changed elsewhere. Reload settings, then try again.

settings.validationEmailTokenLength: Verification token must be exactly 64 characters.
settings.toastEmailVerificationSent: A verification email was sent to the new address. Check your inbox.
settings.emailVerifySectionLead: If you just changed your email, paste the token from the verification email here, or use the link from the email.
settings.emailVerifyFailedToast: Email verification failed. Check the token.
settings.emailVerifySectionLeadShort: Paste the 64-character token from your verification email.
settings.phoneNewDescription: To change your number, request a code, then enter it to confirm.
settings.phoneDevOtpHint: In development, code 1234 is usually accepted.
settings.phoneValidationTooShort: Enter a valid number (at least 8 significant digits).
settings.locationsMetadataDescription: Define regions and related destinations for tours.
settings.locationsPageDescription: Regions and places available as tour destinations in the create/edit tour form.
settings.locationsSectionDescription: Regions organize geography; destinations are what staff select for a tour and customers see on the page.
settings.locationsPanelIntro: Regions group geography (for example a province or country). Destinations are the concrete places—cities, peaks, trails, or lakes—that appear in the tour creation form and on the public tour page. Create regions first, then add destinations under each. Example region: Gilan; example destination: Masal trails.
settings.locationsToastFormValidation: Fix the highlighted fields, then try again.
settings.locationsEmptyRegionsDescription: Use the Add region button to create your first region.
settings.locationsEmptyDestinationsDescription: Use the Add destination button once you have at least one region.
settings.locationsEmptyDestinationsNoRegions: Create a region first, then add destinations.
settings.locationsRegionNameHint: How your team groups destinations (e.g. “Gilan”). Used when organizing the destination list.
settings.locationsCountryHint: Optional hint for admins; does not change how tours work.
settings.locationsSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in region and destination pickers.
settings.locationsActiveHint: Inactive regions/destinations are hidden when staff create new tours.
settings.locationsDestinationNameHint: Shown to customers as the tour location; pick this in the tour form’s destination field.
settings.locationsDestinationRegionHint: Every destination sits under one region for your catalog.
settings.locationsDestinationTypeHint: Helps your team describe the place; optional for travelers.
settings.locationsAltitudeHint: Optional context for mountain or high routes (meters above sea level).
settings.locationsDestinationSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier within the region’s destination list.
settings.locationsValidationCountryMax: Country may be at most 128 characters.
settings.locationsNoDestinationsInRegionHint: Use the Add destination button or choose another filter.
settings.locationsReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.locationsReadOnlyHint: Nothing to show yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to manage regions and destinations.
settings.locationsDeleteRegionConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” and its destination list from settings. Tours already using these remain unchanged until you edit them.
settings.locationsDeleteDestinationConfirmDescrip: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace list. Existing tours are not changed in this step.
settings.equipmentMetadataDescription: Manage reusable equipment items for tours.
settings.equipmentPageDescription: Gear checklist options for tours—used in the create/edit tour form and shown to travelers.
settings.equipmentSectionDescription: Each item is a row travelers may see in required/optional gear; turn items off to stop offering them on new drafts.
settings.equipmentPanelIntro: These items power the required and optional equipment checklist when staff create or edit a tour—travelers use it to know what to bring. Keep names clear and consistent. Examples: hiking boots, sleeping bag, headlamp, trekking poles.
settings.equipmentDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace library. Tours are not changed in this step.
settings.equipmentFieldNameHint: Shown in the tour form checklist and to travelers on the tour page.
settings.equipmentFieldSlugHint: Stable code for data and imports (e.g. sleeping-bag). Usually lowercase Latin.
settings.equipmentFieldCategoryHint: Optional grouping for your team in this list (e.g. Clothing, Safety).
settings.equipmentFieldDescriptionHint: Optional note for staff or ops; may support future UI.
settings.equipmentFieldIconHint: Optional if your UI supports an icon beside the name.
settings.equipmentFieldSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in equipment pickers and checklists.
settings.equipmentFieldActiveHint: Inactive items are not offered when staff configure gear on new tours.
settings.equipmentEmptyDescription: Add your first item to build a reusable list.
settings.equipmentValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.tourThemesPageDescription: Theme tags for the tour form—shown on tour details and in customer filters.
settings.tourThemesSectionDescription: Tags/categories staff select when editing a tour; customers see them when browsing.
settings.tourThemesPanelIntro: Themes are tags or categories for a tour. Staff pick them in the create and edit tour form; customers see them on the tour detail page and when filtering tours. Examples: nature, historical, adventure, family.
settings.tourThemesDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace library. Tours are not changed in this step.
settings.tourThemesFieldNameHint: Shown to customers on the tour page and in filters.
settings.tourThemesFieldSlugHint: Stable ID in your data (e.g. nature-hike); lowercase Latin/numbers.
settings.tourThemesFieldDescriptionHint: Optional extra context where themes are displayed.
settings.tourThemesFieldFormProfileHint: Controls which sections of the create-tour wizard appear when this theme is selected as the main theme.
settings.tourThemesFieldSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in the theme picker.
settings.tourThemesFieldActiveHint: Inactive themes are hidden when staff set up new tours.
settings.tourThemesEmptyDescription: Add your first theme to build a reusable list.
settings.tourThemesReadOnlyHint: No items yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to add themes here.
settings.tourThemesReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.tourThemesValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.tourPresetsMetadataDescription: Manage default field bundles for the tour creation wizard.
settings.tourPresetsPageDescription: Define reusable defaults for the tour creation flow as JSON (wizard wiring comes next).
settings.tourPresetsSectionDescription: Each preset has a name, optional matching rules, and a JSON object of wizard defaults.
settings.tourPresetsAdvancedOnlyBanner: This sub-path is for raw JSON presets only. Regular admins use the main Tour presets settings page (one level up) with the simple form.
settings.tourPresetsPanelIntro: Presets differ from “tour themes” (marketing labels): these rows only store default JSON for the tour creation form — for example policies, participation, logistics sections.
settings.tourPresetsDefaultsTourTypeHint: Stored under overview — same role as tour type in the create wizard.
settings.tourPresetsDefaultsMainThemeHint: Theme UUID in overview — pick an active workspace theme.
settings.tourPresetsDeleteConfirmDescription: “{name}” will be removed from the workspace catalog. Existing tours are unchanged.
settings.tourPresetsFieldActiveHint: Inactive presets are hidden from pickers.
settings.tourPresetsFieldFormProfileHint: In the tour creation wizard, only presets targeting this profile appear in the preset picker.
settings.tourPresetsFieldMatchTourTypeHint: Optional — used later to auto-select this preset by tour type.
settings.tourPresetsFieldMatchThemeHint: Pick a workspace tour theme; optional auto-match later.
settings.tourPresetsFieldDefaultsJsonHint: A JSON object; top-level keys match wizard sections (policies, participation, logistics, overview, …).
settings.tourPresetsEmptyDescription: Create a preset to share defaults across new tours.
settings.tourPresetsReadOnlyHint: Nothing here yet — ask an owner or admin to add presets.
settings.tourPresetsReadOnlyBanner: Read-only — only workspace owners or admins can change presets.
settings.tourPresetsValidationDefaultsJson: Defaults must be valid JSON object.
settings.tourPresetsValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.hubTourPresetsBlurb: JSON defaults for the tour wizard — fewer repeated policies and clauses.
settings.hubTourFormDefaultsBlurb: Save reusable clauses (policies, logistics, participation) with a simple form; applied later when creating tours.
settings.hubTourWizardTemplateBlurb: Field visibility and canonical defaults for the Denali create-tour wizard (workspace template).
settings.tourWizardTemplatePageDescription: Configure Denali field overlays and canonical seed data used when staff create tours.
settings.tourWizardTemplateSectionDescription: Overrides apply on top of the base Denali rule set. Publish runs stricter validation before saving.
settings.tourWizardTemplateLoadFailed: Could not load the workspace tour wizard template.
settings.tourWizardTemplateNotConfigured: No workspace tour wizard template is configured yet. Run workspace provisioning or contact support.
settings.tourWizardTemplateReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins with template management can edit this template.
settings.tourWizardTemplateOverlayHint: Leave visibility or required on “Inherit” to use the base Denali rules for that field.
settings.tourWizardTemplateCanonicalDescription: Partial Denali canonical tour model merged into new tours (validated against the Denali schema).
settings.tourWizardTemplateCanonicalJsonInvalid: Canonical seed must be valid JSON object.
settings.tourWizardTemplateValidationFailed: Fix the highlighted fields before saving.
settings.tourWizardTemplateSaveFailed: Could not save the template. Please try again.
settings.hubAuditTrailBlurb: Browse workspace security and compliance events; filter, export, and inspect details.
settings.hubReconciliationTriageBlurb: Review payment–finance mismatches; acknowledge findings or post a clearing↔wallet ledger adjustment.
settings.auditTrailMetadataDescription: Workspace audit events with filters and export.
settings.auditTrailPageDescription: Append-only log of actions in this workspace. Use filters to narrow results; export creates an additional audit row.
settings.auditTrailAccessDeniedDescription: Your role cannot read the workspace audit trail.
settings.reconciliationTriageMetadataDescription: Workspace payment–finance reconciliation findings and operator actions.
settings.reconciliationTriagePageDescription: Findings from automated payment–finance reconciliation runs. Posting a ledger adjustment writes a balanced journal, emits the mandatory financial outbox event, and appends operator audit rows.
settings.reconciliationTriageIntroBody: Acknowledging a finding appends reconciliation.finding.acknowledged to the workspace audit stream. Applying an adjustment enqueues finance.ledger.double_entry_applied (mandatory financial audit) and reconciliation.ledger.adjustment_applied.
settings.reconciliationTriageAccessDeniedDescript: Your role cannot read reconciliation findings.
settings.reconciliationTriageApplyModalHint: Amount is a positive integer minor-unit string. Flow selects direction between clearing and the booking wallet. Use a fresh idempotency key per attempt.
settings.tourFormDefaultsMetadataDescription: Store reusable text for the tour creation wizard.
settings.tourFormDefaultsPageDescription: Create templates (e.g. hiking) with policies and repeated descriptions. The tour wizard will consume this data later.
settings.tourFormDefaultsSectionDescription: Each row is a template identified by name; optional matching by tour type or main theme.
settings.tourFormDefaultsPanelIntro: Fields mirror the tour creation form. Leave blank to omit that default. For multi-line lists, one item per line.
settings.tourFormDefaultsEmptyDescription: Add your first template — e.g. standard clauses for mountain tours.
settings.tourFormDefaultsReadOnlyHint: Nothing configured yet; ask an owner or manager to add templates.
settings.tourFormDefaultsDeleteConfirmDescription: “{name}” will be removed from the list. Existing tours are unchanged.
settings.tourFormDefaults_fieldAutoAcceptHint: If off, registrations stay pending until manually approved.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_nationalI: National ID must be completed in profile.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_fuelShare: Fuel share per passenger (Toman) — private car
settings.guideLanguagesMetadataDescription: Manage workspace guide languages for tours.
settings.guideLanguagesPageDescription: Languages the guide can speak—chosen in the tour form and shown on the tour page.
settings.guideLanguagesSectionDescription: What the guide speaks on the trip; travelers read this on the public tour detail.
settings.guideLanguagesPanelIntro: List the languages the guide can speak on a trip. Staff select them in the tour form; travelers see them on the tour page. Examples: Persian, English, Istanbul Turkish.
settings.guideLanguagesDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace library. Tours are not changed in this step.
settings.guideLanguagesFieldSlugHint: Short stable code for data (e.g. fa, en, tr-tr). Distinct from the label travelers read.
settings.guideLanguagesFieldSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in the language picker.
settings.guideLanguagesFieldActiveHint: Inactive languages are hidden when staff set up new tours.
settings.guideLanguagesEmptyDescription: Add your first language for tour logistics pickers.
settings.guideLanguagesReadOnlyHint: No items yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to add languages here.
settings.guideLanguagesReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.guideLanguagesValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.detail_locked_body_guest: This information becomes available after you register and your booking is confirmed. Exact meeting coordinates unlock 48 hours before the trip for confirmed participants.
settings.detail_locked_body_gps: Exact meeting points and GPS coordinates unlock 48 hours before departure for confirmed participants.
settings.detail_locked_itinerary: The detailed day-by-day route is available after your registration is accepted.
settings.detail_locked_gps: Exact meeting coordinates unlock before departure for confirmed participants.
settings.detail_locked_logistics: Detailed meeting points and transport notes are available after booking.
settings.detail_locked_participation: Participant requirements are shown after your registration is accepted.
settings.detail_locked_policies: Full cancellation and safety policies are available after booking.
settings.tourFormDefaults_equipmentEmptyCatalog: No active equipment rows yet. Define gear (crampons, harness, sleeping bag, …) under Settings → Equipment so presets can require them.
settings.tourFormDefaults_sectionOverviewIntro: Defaults for tour marketing copy—same shape as the wizard “overview”. Leave a field empty to skip prefilling it.
settings.tourFormDefaults_overview_shortDescripti: 2–3 sentences for cards/lists (wizard short description). ~220 chars recommended.
e.g. Two-day summit trek with hut night; for hikers used to altitude.
settings.tourFormDefaults_overview_longDescriptio: Full programme story for the tour detail page.
Day-by-day narrative, what to expect, support level…
settings.tourFormDefaults_overview_highlights_hin: One bullet per line; stored as an array in the wizard.
settings.tourFormDefaults_overview_highlights_pla:
Hut night
Experienced lead guide
Gear rental option
settings.tourFormDefaults_overview_communicationL: Coordination channel URL (Telegram/WhatsApp) shown after successful signup.
settings.tourFormDefaults_sectionScheduleLocation: Default meeting times and free-text locations; exact Jalali/Gregorian dates are picked later in the wizard.
settings.tourFormDefaults_schedule_departure_hint: 24h clock; editable again in the wizard schedule step.
settings.tourFormDefaults_location_returnPoint_hi: If drop-off differs from start; otherwise leave blank.
settings.tourFormDefaults_location_display_hint: Short label for cards/summary (region or route name).
settings.tourFormDefaults_sectionPoliciesIntro: Optional but strongly recommended—same intent as the wizard policies step for cancellations, refunds and safety.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_cancellationPoli:
e.g. Until 7 days before: full refund minus fees.
3–7 days: 50% refund.
Under 3 days: non-refundable unless force majeure.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_refundPolicy_hin: How and when money is returned; fees and destination account.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_refundPolicy_pla: e.g. Refunds within 72 business hours to the original card; bank fees borne by guest.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_attendanceRules_: Punctuality, staying with the group, on-trail behaviour.
e.g. Be on time at the meeting point; leaving the group without the leader is not allowed.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_lateArrivalPolic: Whether the group waits if someone is late.
e.g. More than 15 minutes late without notice—the group departs without waiting.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_noShowPolicy_hin: What happens if someone never shows up.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_noShowPolicy_pla: e.g. No-show without notice until 2 hours before departure: fare is non-refundable.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_confirmationPoli: When a booking becomes firm—deposit, leader approval, waitlist.
e.g. Booking is confirmed after a 30% deposit; until then the seat is provisionally held.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_capacityPolicy_h: Minimum seats to run, cancellation for low turnout, waitlists.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_capacityPolicy_p: e.g. If fewer than 6 guests 72 hours ahead, the tour is cancelled and fully refunded.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_weatherPolicy_hi: Delays, cancellations or reroutes for weather/safety.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_weatherPolicy_pl: e.g. On orange weather alerts or higher, the programme may shift up to 24 hours before.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_safetyNotes_hint: Operational warnings and obligation to follow the leader.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_safetyNotes_plac: e.g. Helmets/goggles mandatory in snow; do not leave the marked winter line.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_riskDisclaimer_p: e.g. Participants accept inherent mountain risks; this is not medical advice.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_safetyPolicy_hin: Formal safety text if your organisation requires it.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_safetyPolicy_pla: Insert formal safety policy or club rule reference.
settings.tourFormDefaults_policy_reservationRules: Booking rules, caps, member priority or special limits.
e.g. Members first; maximum group size 12.
settings.tourFormDefaults_sectionParticipationInt: Who may join, mandatory vs suggested gear from your workspace catalog, and free-text clauses—aligned with the wizard participation step. Mountain templates should set minimum age and required gear here.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_sportsIns: When on, only guests with valid sports insurance may join; you can repeat details under Requirements.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_nationalI: When on, profile national ID must be filled before signup or waitlist for tours using this preset.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_experienc: Maps to wizard experience enum; empty means no default.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_fitness_h: Overall physical/technical difficulty of the programme.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_gender_hi: No restriction means everyone; empty omits a default.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_minAge_hi: Enforced as acceptance rule when prefilled.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_maxAge_hi: Leave blank if there is no upper limit.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_minPartic: Align with your capacity policy text.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_technical: Short phrase—not a substitute for full acceptance text.
e.g. Comfortable rappelling on single rope; basic ice-tool use
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_medical_p: e.g. Not suitable for unstable cardio-respiratory conditions—confirm health with the leader before booking.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_requireme: General acceptance criteria: prior climbs, documents, etc.
e.g. At least four 4000 m summits with pack; climbing CV required.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_skills_hi: One prerequisite per line—stored as skillsRequired array. List prior climbs or rope skills here.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_skills_pl:
Four 4000 m+ summits with load
Smooth figure-eight rappels
High-camp experience
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_gearRequi: Uses your workspace equipment catalog—same checkboxes as the wizard. Tick items guests must bring (crampons, helmet, …).
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_gearOptio: Helpful but not enforced by the system.
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_documents:
National ID scan
Signed club climbing log
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_suitable_:
Fit hikers with weekly training
Guests OK with shared hut nights
settings.tourFormDefaults_participation_notSuitab: Clarity for who should not join.

Pregnant guests
Children under 15 without altitude experience
settings.tourFormDefaults_sectionLogisticsIntro: Transport mode, organiser insurance, services in/out, meeting logistics—same intent as the wizard logistics step.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_transport_hin: Primary group transport for this template.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_fuelShare_hin: Per-seat fuel share in Toman when private cars are used.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_leaderInsuran: Coverage bundled by the organiser—distinct from personal sports insurance.
e.g. Accident cover up to … per person.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_included_plac: Local shuttle, breakfast, hut night, mountain leader
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_excluded_hint: What travellers pay or arrange themselves.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_excluded_plac: Lunch/dinner not listed; personal layering; private crampon rental
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_meetingDetail: Extra rally instructions beyond the raw address.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_transportDeta: Vehicle type, operator or rough route.
VIP coach Tehran–trailhead; one sanitary stop
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_transportNote: Luggage limits, seating or trailer notes.
One medium pack each; heavy loads coordinated ahead.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_accommodation: Sleeping bag policy or extra charges.
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_support_hint: One service per line—medical kit, evacuation liaison…
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_support_place:
Leader first-aid kit
Local rescue phone on route
settings.tourFormDefaults_logistics_optional_plac:
Rent ice tools
Optional drone photo package
